news.summary: Excella, an innovative technology company based in Arlington, has recently appointed Tammy McChain as their Vice President of National Security. McChain will be overseeing Excella's operations within the National Security sector, focusing on client engagements and promoting innovation. As a key member of Excella's senior management, she will play a crucial role in delivering top-notch services and driving growth for the company. With her wealth of experience in this field, McChain is expected to lead Excella to new heights.
news.headline: Excella names Tammy McChain as VP of National Security, in charge of leading Excella's National Security market.

news.summary: In New York, Eight Sleep unveiled its latest products, the Pod 5 and a hydro-powered Blanket, combining artificial intelligence and real-time biometric sensing to enhance sleep quality. The Health Check feature, containing AI-driven algorithms, converts the Pod into a preventive health tool. The Pod 5 marks the company's fifth generation of products, following the success of the acclaimed Pod. These innovations aim to convert any regular bed into a smart and adaptable sleep solution.
news.headline: Eight Sleep introduces Pod 5: AI-Powered Sleep System with immersive tech to improve sleep and health solutions.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas and Eindhoven, Netherlands, Fluence has recently highlighted King City Gardens in their latest Innovator Spotlight. King City Gardens is a leading cannabis cultivator in Ohio, specializing in medical and recreational products.
news.headline: Fluence LED technology boosts production at King City Gardens in Ohio, showcasing growth in medical and recreational cannabis.

news.summary: American Hole ‘n One, a respected provider of hole-in-one insurance for four decades, has revealed its support for the PGA of America’s Golf Retirement Plus program. In this initiative, PGA Golf Professionals can earn incentives for referring qualifying contracts purchased either by their facilities or tournament organizers at select golf courses to AHNO. This collaboration comes as AHNO aims to further strengthen its longstanding presence in the industry.
news.headline: American Hole ‘n One sponsors PGA's Golf Retirement Plus program, offering incentives to PGA pros for referrals.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) and Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco”) (NASDAQ: COST) have revealed a new multi-year collaboration, designating Affirm as the pay-over-time service provider for Costco.com in the U.S. Commencing immediately, U.S. Costco members making online purchases can utilize Affirm during checkout to make payments over time, devoid of late or hidden charges. This partnership comes as consumers have spent an estimated $250 billion online annually.
news.headline: Costco partners with Affirm to offer pay-over-time option on Costco.com with no hidden fees. Consumers spent $250 billion online.

news.summary: Psycho Bunny, a premium menswear brand, has recently welcomed French tennis player Arthur Rinderknech to its roster of tennis ambassadors. Rinderknech, recognized for his strong serve and versatile playing style, will be donning bespoke Psycho Bunny attire during his appearances on the ATP Tour. This collaboration highlights Psycho Bunny's increasing involvement in tennis, catering to emerging talents and established figures. Arthur Rinderknech's addition aligns with the brand's strategy to support athletes in the sport.
news.headline: Psycho Bunny signs French tennis player Arthur Rinderknech in multi-year deal, outfitting him in custom apparel on ATP Tour.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Amplitude, Inc. has introduced enhanced features to unite marketing and product data, aiding marketers in maximizing investments across various channels. The new capabilities enable teams to identify factors influencing conversions and Lifetime Value (LTV), assess Return on Ad Spend more accurately, and target audiences effectively with tailored messages. These enhancements within Amplitude’s comprehensive platform empower marketers to optimize each dollar spent and campaign executed. This development comes as a response to the evolving demands placed on marketers in today's landscape.
news.headline: Amplitude introduces new marketing capabilities to optimize ROI, drive conversions, and target audiences effectively.

news.summary: ArcBest, based in Fort Smith, Arkansas, has reported advancements in their Vaux Vision pilots and named Brian Nachtigall as the new General Manager of Vaux.
news.headline: ArcBest introduces Vaux Vision advancements, appoints Brian Nachtigall as General Manager of Vaux in Fort Smith, Arkansas.

news.summary: Yesterday, it was reported that the global poverty rate has dropped to its lowest level in history, with approximately 9.2% of the world's population living in extreme poverty. This means that around 734 million people are living on less than $1.90 a day. The largest decrease in poverty was seen in East Asia and the Pacific region, where the poverty rate fell to 1.2%. However, progress in reducing poverty has been uneven, with Sub-Saharan Africa still having the highest poverty rate at 41.1%. Despite these improvements, there are concerns that the COVID-19 pandemic could reverse some of the progress made in poverty reduction efforts.
news.headline: DoorDash partners with Wing to expand drone delivery in Charlotte, enhancing service to more customers.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Carvana, a leader in online used car sales, introduced a special paint design for NASCAR great Jimmie Johnson's No. 84 Toyota. The design is in honor of his 700th career start at the upcoming Coca-Cola 600 race, taking place at the track where he began his NASCAR Cup Series journey in 2001. Following a notable third-place finish at the 2025 Daytona 500, Johnson is back at Charlotte Motor Speedway, where he has clinched eight Cup Series wins.
news.headline: Carvana commemorates Jimmie Johnson's 700th NASCAR start with a special paint scheme on No. 84 Toyota for Coca-Cola 600.

news.summary: A global leader in apparel manufacturing, Komar, has entered into a strategic partnership with Inspectorio, as unveiled today.
news.headline: Inspectorio partners with Komar to enhance sustainability, compliance, and supply chain visibility globally.

news.summary: A Cintas location in Richmond, Virginia has been acknowledged by OSHA's Voluntary Protection Program (VPP) Star for its exceptional health and safety management. This recognition highlights the site as a top worksite for implementing best practices in safety, with stringent standards that ensure a secure work environment. The achievement showcases the site's commitment to upholding high levels of safety and health protocols.
news.headline: Cintas location in Richmond, VA certified as VPP Star Site by OSHA, highlighting health and safety practices.

news.summary: In Watsonville, California, Driscoll’s has taken steps to challenge a recent ruling by the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District in favor of California Berry Cultivars (CBC). The company has filed a protective appeal in response. This appeal emphasizes Driscoll’s dedication to protecting its intellectual property, specifically patented strawberry varieties that CBC allegedly included in its breeding program without authorization. Internal documents from CBC reportedly confirm this unauthorized use. Driscoll’s aims to dispute the court’s decision and uphold its rights in this matter.
news.headline: Driscoll’s appeals ruling in favor of California Berry Cultivars, defending patented strawberry varieties.

news.summary: In San Diego, a leading brand in avocado oil, Chosen Foods, has announced the launch of four fresh salad dressing varieties alongside the revival of three enhanced classic flavors. Renowned as America’s top choice for avocado oil, Chosen Foods is expanding its product line to cater to consumer preferences.
news.headline: Chosen Foods debuts line of avocado oil dressings, includes 4 new flavors and revamps 3 classics in San Diego.

news.summary: Ankeny, Iowa-based convenience store chain Casey's (NASDAQ: CASY) is reintroducing its popular BBQ Brisket Pizza to celebrate National Barbecue Day. The unique blend of flavors is making a comeback, showcasing Casey's reputation for innovation in the food industry. Renowned chef Andrew Zimmern, a four-time James Beard and Emmy award winner known for his culinary explorations, has partnered with Casey's to promote this limited-time offering. Customers are encouraged to indulge in a slice of summer with this flavorful pizza.
news.headline: Casey's partners with Food Network's Andrew Zimmern to bring back BBQ Brisket Pizza for National Barbecue Day.

news.summary: Veolia’s Water Technologies & Solutions division has secured a lucrative $34 million deal to provide biogas upgrading technology for the Southeast Treatment Plant of the San Francisco Public Utilities Commission (SFPUC). Originally constructed in 1952, the plant is currently undergoing a massive $3 billion renovation project to shift its function from a conventional wastewater treatment facility to an advanced resource recovery center. This transformation will allow for the conversion of wastewater byproducts into valuable resources.
news.headline: Veolia to provide biogas tech for SF plant, $34M contract for resource center upgrading, 1952 facility modernization.

news.summary: In Seattle, doxo unveiled a recent report showcasing significant differences in the essential cost of living nationwide. According to doxo's Cost of Bills Index™ (COBI), the 2025 Cost of Bills Index Report highlighted a notable contrast in household bill expenses throughout the U.S. The study indicated that residents in pricier states such as California, Hawaii, and New Jersey face bills up to 39% higher than the national median, while those in more affordable states like West Virginia bear a comparatively lower burden.
news.headline: US Economy shrinking, doxo's report shows major cost variations nationwide, with some states paying 39% more than national median.

news.summary: Nashville, Tennessee - On May 14, 2025, AngelQ released the AngelQ App on the Apple App Store. This app, designed with a focus on child safety, offers an AI-assisted search function specifically tailored for kids. The innovative technology company aims to provide a safe and powerful platform for children, marking a significant milestone in their mission.
news.headline: AngelQ introduces AI-powered browser for kids, the AngelQ App, for safe browsing. Available for download on Apple App Store.

news.summary: Sepio has significantly increased its original equipment manufacturer (OEM) efforts. In Rockville, Maryland on May 14, 2025, following Lenovo's recent introduction of the ThinkShield Solutions, Sepio is emphasizing the importance of the ThinkShield Hardware Defense, developed by Sepio, in protecting small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), schools, and other entities.
news.headline: Sepio projects multi-million dollar revenue from Lenovo partnership, highlighting ThinkShield Hardware Defense success in protecting SMBs and schools.

news.summary: The Charles F. Kettering Foundation has granted a $100,000 award to individuals driving progress in fostering inclusive democracy on a global scale. This foundation is dedicated to addressing democratic challenges and promoting inclusive governance internationally. Today, they disclosed the recipients of this award, highlighting their significant contributions to democratic advancement.
news.headline: Judith Browne Dianis and Alexei Navalny win $100,000 Kettering Democracy Prize for advancing inclusive democracy globally.

news.summary: FirstEnergy Corp, a leading energy company listed on the NYSE under the symbol FE, revealed that Michael Auseré will assume the position of Vice President, Financial Planning and Analysis starting on June 2. Auseré will oversee long-term planning and budgeting for the company.
news.headline: FirstEnergy has appointed Michael Auseré as VP, Financial Planning & Analysis, effective June 2, 2025. #NYSE: FE.

news.summary: Significant progress has been made leading up to the special assembly of Shyft shareholders on June 17, 2025, in NOVI, Michigan. The Shyft Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHYF), a premier company in specialty vehicle production, assembly, and customization for commercial purposes in North America, has reported this advancement.
news.headline: Shyft Group's registration statement and proxy statement filed for merger with Aebi Schmidt; special meeting on June 17, 2025.

news.summary: The presentation of the initial quarter outcomes will take place on May 14, 2025. For more details, please refer to the enclosed link.
news.headline: SFL reports preliminary first quarter 2025 results, presentation on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Enveil, a leading company in Privacy Enhancing Technology safeguarding Data in Use, has revealed a new partnership aimed at enhancing secure and efficient cross-domain data utilization. The engagement, announced on May 14, 2025, will harness Enveil's advanced capabilities to drive this initiative forward. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards promoting data security and effectiveness across multiple domains.
news.headline: Enveil supports DIU with Privacy Enhancing Tech. Contract advances secure data usage. - May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development, Cohere Health has secured a significant investment to further expand its presence in various clinical workflows, solidifying its position as a market leader in transforming prior authorizations. The investment comes as Cohere Health aims to enhance its clinical intelligence solutions for health plans and entities at risk. This move is expected to bolster Cohere's reach significantly, positioning the company for continued growth and innovation. The investment further underscores the confidence in Cohere Health's capabilities, with the funding set to propel the company's expansion and market impact. Overall, this investment marks a pivotal moment for Cohere Health as it continues to redefine and lead in the realm of prior authorization transformation.
news.headline: Cohere Health raises $90M in Series C to enhance AI platform for health plan decisions and workflows.

news.summary: A recent report has listed universities worldwide based on the quantity of ultra wealthy graduates they have. According to Altrata data, there has been a 13% rise in the total number of ultra wealthy individuals from 2023 to 2024. The report was released today in New York on May 14, 2025 by Altrata, a prominent provider of information regarding affluent individuals.
news.headline: Altrata report reveals 13% rise in ultra-wealthy population from 2023 to 2024, ranking universities on wealthy alumni.

news.summary: In Sonoma, California on May 14, 2025, Imagery Estate Winery enlisted ELLE Street Art, a renowned graffiti and mixed-media artist, for a special collaboration. This project aimed to create a product that transcended being merely wine or art, instead fostering a meaningful conversation between the two disciplines. The project resulted in a distinctive bottle design that embodies the essence of both crafts, showcasing two vibrant artistic expressions.
news.headline: Imagery Estate Winery collaborates with ELLE Street Art for 2023 Cabernet Sauvignon, blending wine and art.

news.summary: Duro, a top PLM platform for hardware engineering, revealed its open, flexible, and collaborative strategy that aims to avoid vendor lock-in and streamline integration, providing immediate value to customers and accelerating time to market. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Duro launches Technology Partner Program for hardware engineering, aims to deliver digital thread for customers, preventing vendor lock-in. LOS ANGELES, May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Introducing an 11-piece jewelry collection aimed at empowering individuals to embrace their inner radiance and recognize their worth. Los Angeles, May 14, 2025 - Mondays Made, a jewelry brand owned by women, renowned for its classic styles and emphasis on self-representation, debuts the release of its latest collection.
news.headline: Mondays Made and Influencer Miki Rai collaborate on 'Rise & Shine' jewelry collection with 11 pieces aiming to inspire self-confidence. Los Angeles, May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Quva has recently opened its second distribution facility in Sugar Land, Texas, as part of its expansion of 503B forward distribution operations. This new facility has added an extra 20,000 square feet of distribution capacity to Quva's network. This move aims to enhance Quva's integrated services platform with a focus on forward distribution capabilities.
news.headline: Quva opens 2nd distribution center in Sugar Land, TX adding 20,000 sq. ft. space to its 503B operations.

news.summary: Healthcare leaders gather in San Francisco on May 14, 2025, to promote innovation, efficiency, and patient-centered transformation. Medallion, a key player in credentialing and provider network management, introduces Elevate 2025, its main virtual event.
news.headline: Medallion's Elevate 2025 Conference on healthcare future set for Sept 17, 2025, focusing on innovation and efficiency.

news.summary: Recognized for their expertise in data analysis, preparation, and presentation, higher education teams in Cary, North Carolina are now using the new SAS Viya Workbench for Learners. The software, introduced on May 14, 2025, allows students to delve into advanced analytics techniques. It poses the possibility of utilizing machine learning for predicting conditions like breast cancer and Alzheimer's disease. Additionally, the tool aids in the examination of Facebook's efforts to decrease social issues.
news.headline: SAS Curiosity Cup highlights student excellence in data/AI. Teams recognized for data analysis, presentation. New SAS Viya Workbench used.

news.summary: A multi-restaurant platform company called Craveworthy Brands has partnered with Taffer's Tavern, a restaurant founded by award-winning television host and executive producer. The partnership aims to enhance operations and expand the franchise program of Taffer's Tavern. This innovative collaboration was announced in Chicago on May 14, 2025. Taffer's Tavern is known for providing exceptional service and experiences to its customers. Through this partnership, they plan to leverage Craveworthy's expertise to scale their operations and franchise offerings. This strategic move is expected to significantly boost the growth and reach of Taffer's Tavern, with both companies looking forward to a successful collaboration.
news.headline: Craveworthy Brands and Bar Rescue's Jon Taffer team up for new restaurant venture Taffer's Tavern.

news.summary: In May 14, 2025, Caron Scientific, Inc., headquartered in Marietta, Ohio, revealed the introduction of a new Cleanroom alternative for its 25 and 33 cubic feet incubators and chambers. Caron Scientific is recognized for delivering cutting-edge environmental testing, incubation, and controlled environment solutions.
news.headline: Caron Scientific introduces new cleanroom option for 25 and 33 cubic feet incubators and chambers.

news.summary: "Terri & Sandy Bring 'Southern Strength' to Revitalize Mitchum Brand for Modern Times NEW YORK, 14th May 2025 - With a rich history of providing effective anti-perspirant and odor protection, the iconic Mitchum deodorant brand is undergoing a rejuvenation under the guidance of Terri & Sandy. The bold new campaign is designed to resonate with a fresh audience, highlighting the brand's enduring legacy while positioning it for success in today's market landscape. This move comes as Mitchum looks to connect with a younger demographic, leveraging its reputation for strength and reliability. Stay tuned for the exciting updates from this legendary brand."
news.headline: Mitchum launches "Southern Strength" campaign targeting new generation. Embraces heritage in bold move.
TELEFONICA IS SAID TO DRAW UP PLANS FOR LIBERTY'S STAKE IN VMO2

news.summary: The launch of the Melania meme coin (CRYPTO: MELANIA) linked to former First Lady Melania Trump has sparked controversy due to suspicious trades that occurred before its official announcement. Prior to any public acknowledgment by Melania Trump on Truth Social, 24 crypto wallets swiftly purchased $2.6 million worth of MELANIA. Shortly after, these wallets sold their holdings for a remarkable profit of $100 million. The quick and significant nature of these transactions raises concerns regarding potential early access to information. Unlike traditional IPOs, meme coins like MELANIA are typically initially priced low and left to establish their market worth. This situation underscores the need for transparency and fair practices in the cryptocurrency market. Detailed coverage can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Melania Trump meme coin launch stirred controversy as 24 wallets bought $2.6M, sold for $100M profits within days.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, First Busey Corporation disclosed the pricing details of their underwritten public offering. The offering includes 8,000,000 depositary shares, where each share signifies a 1/40th ownership stake in a share of its 8.25% Fixed Rate Series B Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, known as the "Series B preferred stock." This preferred stock holds a liquidation preference of $1,000 per share, equivalent to $25.00 per depositary share. First Busey Corporation operates as the holding company for Busey Bank and CrossFirst Bank.
news.headline: First Busey Corp announces pricing of 8M depositary shares, each representing 1/40th ownership interest in Series B stock.

news.summary: Shares of Innovative Eyewear, Inc. (NASDAQ: LUCY) are up in premarket trading today. The company reported a loss per share of 72 cents, surpassing expectations of 73 cents, while their quarterly sales reached $454.50 thousand, a 19% increase from the previous year. Despite this growth, sales fell short of the projected one million dollars. The rise in sales was mainly due to increased unit sales volume, bolstered by new product launches in 2024 including the co-branded Nautica Powered by Lucyd and Eddie Bauer Powered by... (The full story is available on Benzinga.com).
news.headline: Innovative Eyewear stock rises in premarket as company beats EPS estimates with a loss of 72 cents, but misses revenue expectations with $454.50K sales, up 19% YoY.

news.summary: Elah Holdings, Inc. (OTC: ELLH) has disclosed its unaudited financial statements and disclosure report for the first quarter of 2025 in Dallas on May 14, 2025. Interested parties can access this information at www.elahholdings.com under the Financial Releases section. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Elah Holdings, Inc. releases Q1 2025 financial report; visit www.elahholdings.com for details.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on May 14, 2025, Micropolis Holding Co. revealed its partnership (NYSE: MCRP) with SEE Holding Ltd to test advanced technologies at The Sustainable City 2.0. The initiative includes deploying robotics platforms, AI-driven surveillance systems, smart mobility applications, and edge computing nodes in upcoming Sustainable City projects. Micropolis is known for its expertise in unmanned ground vehicles and AI-based security solutions. This collaboration marks a significant step towards integrating cutting-edge technologies into urban development projects like TSC 2.0, showcasing the fusion of innovation and sustainability in modern city planning.
news.headline: Micropolis tests AI and robotics at Sustainable City 2.0 with SEE Holding, deploying advanced platforms and systems.

news.summary: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation reported their first quarter 2025 results, highlighting advancements in metallurgical work and engineering studies, including a trade-off study between roasting and pressure oxidation processing options for sulfide ore. They announced positive results from the Brimstone high-grade silver trend and identified two new exploration targets, Bay and Manganese. The company is considering a start-up heap leach operation due to high commodity prices and new oxide target areas. Hycroft emphasized their strong safety record and environmental stewardship, with over 1.2 million man-hours without a Lost Time Incident and successful reclamation efforts. Less than 10% of their 64,000-acre property has been explored, positioning them well in the current precious metals environment.
news.headline: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation provided updates on first quarter 2025 results, highlighting advancements in metallurgical testing and exploration drilling. The company maintained a 0.00 TRIFR for over two years and had successful environmental reclamation efforts. Read more on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Santa Clara, California - On May 14, 2025, AMD revealed a significant development as its board of directors endorsed a fresh $6 billion share repurchase initiative. This newly approved scheme supplements the leftover amount, which was around $4 billion as of March 29, 2025, from its ongoing share repurchase program. Consequently, the total current authority for repurchasing shares now stands at roughly $10 billion.
news.headline: AMD announced a new $6 billion share repurchase program, adding to the existing $4 billion, totaling current repurchase authority to $10 billion.
Phase 2 Seabreeze STAT COPD study by Connect Biopharma examines Rademikibart for COPD exacerbation treatment.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Liven AS held its yearly general meeting at their salon office located at Telliskivi 60/5, 10412, Tallinn (ground floor). The meeting, conducted in Estonian, addressed important matters related to the company's operations and finances.
news.headline: Annual general meeting of Liven AS held on 14.05.2025 at Telliskivi 60/5, Tallinn, with discussions in Estonian.

news.summary: Visa Direct, in partnership with Ria Money Transfer, Xe, and Dandelion, has leveraged Visa's extensive network of more than 4 billion debit cards to enhance Dandelion's existing network. This collaboration aims to facilitate seamless money transfers globally.
news.headline: Euronet's Money Transfer Segment partners with Visa Direct, reaching over 4 billion debit cards through Dandelion network.

news.summary: In Warsaw, Indiana on May 14, 2025, Lakeland Financial Corporation (Nasdaq Global Select/LKFN) and Lake City Bank made public that Dan Starr and Mindy Creighton Truex have been selected to join their Boards of Directors.
news.headline: Dan Starr and Mindy Creighton Truex appointed to Lakeland Financial Corporation and Lake City Bank Boards of Directors on May 14, 2025. #FinanceNews #BoardsAppointments

news.summary: In Chicago on May 14, 2025, Sprout Social (Nasdaq: SPT), a top provider of cloud-based social media management software, unveiled enhancements to its Care by Sprout Social solution. The updates aim to assist brands in exceeding increasing customer demands by enabling teams to provide advanced, safe, and analytics-based social care. This shift transforms support from reactive to a strategic business tool. As part of the announcement, Sprout Social mentioned that an AI agent integration is on the horizon. This impending feature will amplify the customer care experience and boost efficiency and effectiveness for brands even further.
news.headline: Sprout Social introduces innovative features to Care solution, enhancing proactive social care & driving business impact with AI integration.

news.summary: Pixelmon recently finalized an exclusive agreement with Avalanche for the release of two upcoming mobile games on the platform.
news.headline: 'Pixelmon' to release 2 mobile games 'Warden's Ascent' on Avalanche in exclusive deal, signaling strategic move.
